subject: Re: Vanity Fair
body:
seperate from "I think he's great.." nothing else...

----- Original Message ----
From: Gmax <gmax1@mindspring.com>
To: "Epstein, Jeffrey" <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Saturday, October 28, 2006 11:59:59 AM
Subject: Fw: Vanity Fair

How do you want me to respond if at all



G

                



-----Original Message-----

From: "Peggy Siegal" <peggy@peggysiegal.com>

Date: Sat, 28 Oct 2006 15:27:24 

To:"Cecilia Steen" <cecilia.steen@gmail.com>,       "Lesley Groff" <lesley@nysgllc.com>,       "Ghislaine Maxwell" <gmax1@mindspring.com>

Subject: Vanity Fair



Do you all know about this?  David Margolick is writing....John Connerly is helping to report.  Can only assume Jeffrey does not want me to talk to this reporter....not unless he wants certain things said on his behalf...xxoo Peggy

Sent via BlackBerry from Cingular Wireless



-----Original Message-----

From: Margolick@aol.com

Date:     Sat, 28 Oct 2006 10:36:55 

To:peggy@peggysiegal.com

Subject: Re: VOLVER screening - please specify which time you'd like to attend



   I don't know which issue it will be...it's due in a few weeks. The story won't be bad, but fair: he's a complex guy. It helps if his friends talk to me honesty and if he speaks some, too.
body_html:
seperate from "I think he's great.." nothing else...
